issue.title: Fix dashboard API performance — inspectDashboardQueue timeout

metadata.evidenceSummary: Dashboard API responds in <100ms. FlowWorkRuntime created at startup, inspectDashboardQueue called directly — no CLI spawn. 3s cache prevents runtime hammering.
